messages.message: Unused eslint-disable directive (no problems were reported from 'no-restricted-globals').
The 'safeWallets' conditional could make the dependencies of useEffect Hook (at line 106) change on every render. To fix this, wrap the initialization of 'safeWallets' in its own useMemo() Hook.
React Hook useMemo has an unnecessary dependency: 'user.id'. Either exclude it or remove the dependency array.
